structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone Minimum Outdoor Air and Minimum Airflow Setpoints (California Title 24)
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: VAV terminal units, fan-powered terminal units, SZVAV AHUs
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Calculates Zone-Abs-OA-min and Zone-Des-OA-min based on priority conditions, and sets Vmin and Vmin* accordingly.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone requires mechanical ventilation and project complies with California Title 24.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Determine Zone-Abs-OA-min and Zone-Des-OA-min per priority list. Set Vmin = Zone-Abs-OA-min if 'AUTO', else as entered. Set Vmin* = Vmin except modified by occupancy/window/CO2. For CO2 DCV, use P-only loop to reset Vmin* from Vmin to Vcool-max (or VCO2-max) at 0-50% output; 50-100% output used at system level.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Zone-Abs-OA-min shall be reset based on the following conditions in order from highest to lowest priority: i. Zero if the zone has a window switch and the window is open. ii. Zero if the zone has an occupancy sensor and is unpopulated and is permitted to be in occupied-standby mode per Section 3.1.1.2.b.3.

anchor_repair_reason: evidence_quote replaced with verbatim section heading line
judge_reason: Section 5.2.1.4 has been deleted from Guideline 36, so this sequence is not part of the operational knowledge.

structured_payload_candidate.title: SZVAV AHU Freeze Protection Stages
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Three-stage freeze protection: Stage 1 modulates heating to maintain SAT≥6°C; Stage 2 closes OA dampers for 1 hour; Stage 3 shuts down unit and energizes pumps.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Supply air temperature drops below thresholds.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Stage 1: If SAT < 4°C for 5 min, send HHW requests, override OA to minimum, modulate heating to maintain SAT≥6°C; disable when SAT > 7°C for 5 min. Stage 2: If SAT < 3°C for 5 min, close OA dampers for 1 hour, set Level 3 alarm; after 1 hour resume Stage 1. Stage 3: If freeze-stat or SAT < 3°C for 15 min or < 1°C for 5 min, shut down fans, close OA, open CHW valve 100%, energize CHW pump, modulate heating to maintain SAT or MAT at 27°C, set Level 2 alarm; requires manual reset.
configurable_values: Stage 3 thresholds (3°C for 15 min, 1°C for 5 min)
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the supply air temperature drops below 4°C (40°F) for 5 minutes, send two (or more, as required to ensure that heating plant is active) heating hot-water plant requests, override the outdoor air damper to the minimum position, and modulate the heating coil to maintain a supply air temperature of at least 6°C (42°F).

evidence_quote: If the supply air temperature drops below 4°C (40°F) for 5 minutes, send two (or more, as required to ensure that heating plant is active) heating hot-water plant requests, override the outdoor air damper to the minimum position, and modulate the heating coil to maintain a supply air temperature of at least 6°C (42°F).
evidence_text: If the supply air temperature drops below 4°C (40°F) for 5 minutes, send two (or more, as required to ensure that heating plant is active) heating hot-water plant requests, override the outdoor air damper to the minimum position, and modulate the heating coil to maintain a supply air temperature of at least 6°C (42°F).
judge_reason: Evidence only supports stage 1 modulating action, not stage 2 closure for 1 hour or stage 3 shutdown.
